interactions.final_answer:
### 1. SCOPE CONFIG - **Scope name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet - **Description**: Central hub for firm-wide updates, business line performance, risk management, compliance policies, and strategic communications upholding the Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy. - **Welcome message**: Welcome to the JPMorgan Chase & Co. intranet, your source for timely insights on record FY2024 results ($166B revenue, $58B net income), global operations across 100+ countries, and key initiatives like the 270 Park Avenue HQ and LLM Suite rollout. - **image_url**: jp/logo.png - **primary_color**: #003B7A - **primary_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **secondary_color**: #117ACA - **warn_color**: #C8102E - **warn_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **number_of_highlights**: 4 - **highlights_carousel**: true - **highlights_style**: BannerCarousel - **Footer block links** (3 columns): - Column 1 (title: "Company", icon: null): links [{caption: "About Us", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about"}, {caption: "Careers", link: "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {caption: "Investor Relations", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}] - Column 2 (title: "Global Presence", icon: null): links [{caption: "New York HQ", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/locations"}, {caption: "London", link: "/scope/jpmorganchase/london-office"}, {caption: "Asia-Pacific", link: "/scope/jpmorganchase/apac"}] - Column 3 (title: "Resources", icon: null): links [{caption: "Annual Report", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report"}, {caption: "Newsroom", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}, {caption: "Business Principles", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles"}] - **Social links**: [{type: "linkedInLink", link: "https://linkedin.com/company/jpmorgan-chase"}, {type: "twitterLink", link: "https://twitter.com/jpmorgan"}, {type: "youtubeLink", link: "https://youtube.com/jpmorgan"}] - **Navigation links**: - topBarLinks: [{caption: "Investor Relations", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {caption: "Careers", link: "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {caption: "Annual Letter", link: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report"}] - footerLinks: [{caption: "JPMorgan.com", link: "https://www.jpmorgan.com"}, {caption: "Chase.com", link: "https://www.chase.com"}, {caption: "Asset Management", link: "https://am.jpmorgan.com"}, {caption: "Private Bank", link: "https://privatebank.jpmorgan.com"}, {caption: "Onyx", link: "https://www.jpmorgan.com/onyx"}] - socialLinks: as above ### 2. CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE (5 channels; Ch1-Ch3 PRIMARY, Ch4-Ch5 SECONDARY) **Ch1: Leadership & Strategy** (PRIMARY) - **Purpose**: Firm-wide strategic direction from Jamie Dimon and executives, including annual letters and major milestones. - **Type**: corporate - **Color**: #003B7A - **is_sticky**: true - **image_url**: jp/leadership_speech.png - **hide_on_homepage_feed**: false - **hide_highlights**: false - **Description**:

Access CEO communications, annual shareholder letters, and executive updates on the firm's Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy and global strategy.

Key topics include geopolitical risks, regulatory outlook, and performance against G-SIB standards, ensuring all 316,000 employees align with long-term priorities.

From FY2024 record net income of $58B to the 270 Park Avenue HQ completion in 2025.

- **Tabs**: ["Articles"] - **initial_tab**: "Articles" - **default_role**: "None" - **FAQ**: [] (pure broadcast) **Ch2: Business Line Performance** (PRIMARY) - **Purpose**: Updates on CIB, CCB, CB, and AWM results, league tables, and client wins. - **Type**: public - **Color**: #117ACA - **is_sticky**: true - **image_url**: jp/financial_report.png - **hide_on_homepage_feed**: false - **hide_highlights**: false - **Description**:

Track segment revenues (CIB $59B, CCB $60B FY2024), M&A mandates, trading volumes, and league table rankings across investment banking, markets, and consumer banking.

Highlights include First Republic integration and payments processing exceeding $10T daily.

Essential for understanding how our four lines of business drive $166B annual revenue.

- **Tabs**: ["Articles"] - **initial_tab**: "Articles" - **default_role**: "Reader" - **FAQ**: [] (broadcast-focused) **Ch3: Risk & Compliance** (PRIMARY) - **Purpose**: Policies, regulatory updates, stress tests, and mandatory acknowledgements. - **Type**: corporate - **Color**: #C8102E - **is_sticky**: true - **image_url**: jp/risk.png - **hide_on_homepage_feed**: false - **hide_highlights**: false - **Description**:

Mandatory guidance on credit, market, liquidity, operational, and conduct risks, aligned with OCC, Fed, and global regulators.

Covers CET1 ratios above minimums, annual stress testing (DFAST/CCAR), and information barrier training for all employees.

Uphold our independent CRO structure and "doing the right thing" principle.

- **Tabs**: ["Articles", "Pages"] - **initial_tab**: "Articles" - **default_role**: "None" - **FAQ**: [{question: "What is the Information Barrier Policy?", answer: "Strict separation of MNPI between teams; consult Legal/Compliance before sharing."}, {question: "How do we report stress test results?", answer: "CET1 remains well above requirements; details in quarterly filings."}, {question: "What is Conduct Risk?", answer: "Risk from employee behavior; report via ethics hotline."}] **Ch4: Technology & Innovation** (SECONDARY) - **Purpose**: $17B tech investments, LLM Suite, Onyx, and COIN/Athena updates. - **Type**: public - **Color**: #117ACA - **is_sticky**: false - **image_url**: jp/blockchain.png - **hide_on_homepage_feed**: true - **hide_highlights**: true - **Description**:

Insights on 63,000 technologists building Fusion Data Platform, JPM Coin, and AI tools processing $10T daily payments.

From Palo Alto engineering to blockchain repo settlements, countering perceptions of traditional banking.

Dimon: AI as transformative as the printing press.

- **Tabs**: ["Articles", "Pages"] - **initial_tab**: "Articles" - **default_role**: "Reader" - **FAQ**: [{question: "What is LLM Suite?", answer: "Internal AI for summarization, research, code; rolled out 2024."}, {question: "How does Onyx work?", answer: "Permissioned blockchain for institutional settlement with JPM Coin."}] **Ch5: People & Careers** (SECONDARY) - **Purpose**: MD promotions, apprenticeships, return-to-office, and workforce programs. - **Type**: public - **Color**: #003B7A - **is_sticky**: false - **image_url**: jp/community.png - **hide_on_homepage_feed**: true - **hide_highlights**: true - **Description**:

Analyst/Associate programs, 327 MD promotions (Class of 2024), and initiatives like New Skills at Work ($350M).

Five-day office policy, veterans hiring, and Advancing Black Pathways for 316,000 employees globally.

Build relationships in the room, per firm culture.

- **Tabs**: ["Articles"] - **initial_tab**: "Articles" - **default_role**: "Reader" - **FAQ**: [{question: "What is the return-to-office policy?", answer: "Full five days for MDs, extended firm-wide; regional variations apply."}, {question: "How to apply for Analyst Programme?", answer: "Via careers.jpmorgan.com; internships are primary pipeline."}, {question: "What are MD promotion criteria?", answer: "Global committee review; client performance and team leadership key."}] ### 3. CONTENT CALENDAR **Ch1 Leadership & Strategy** (3 articles; 1 highlight, 1 sticky): - Title: FY2024 Record Net Income: $58B and Fortress Balance Sheet Strength Type: recap; tags: ['fy2024', 'earnings', 'dimon-letter', 'g-sib']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Dimon letter themes, $166B revenue breakdown, geopolitical risks. - Title: 270 Park Avenue HQ: Phased Move to Net-Zero Tower in 2025 Type: milestone; tags: ['hq-move', 'sustainability', 'new-york']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false Body outline: 60-story design, 14k employees, carbon standards. - Title: Jamie Dimon's 2024 Shareholder Letter: Key Themes for Employees Type: announcement; tags: ['annual-letter', 'strategy', 'regulation']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Deficit warnings, capitalism health, firm plans. **Ch2 Business Line Performance** (3 articles; 1 highlight, 1 sticky): - Title: First Republic Acquisition Integration: $173B Loans Absorbed Type: recap; tags: ['first-republic', 'awm', 'wealth-management']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: West Coast HNW clients, minimal dilution. - Title: CIB #1 in Global M&A Fees: League Table Leadership Type: spotlight; tags: ['cib', 'investment-banking', 'league-tables']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false Body outline: Fee revenue, mandates, tombstones. - Title: Payments Milestone: $10T Daily Processing via Treasury Services Type: milestone; tags: ['payments', 'treasury', 'ccb-cb']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Real-time infra, B2B embedded growth. **Ch3 Risk & Compliance** (3 articles; 1 highlight, 2 sticky): - Title: Information Barrier Policy: Mandatory MNPI Acknowledgement Type: policy; tags: ['chinese-walls', 'mnpi', 'compliance']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: true Body outline: Strict barriers, training, consult Legal (exact policy text). - Title: 2024 Fed Stress Test Results: CET1 Well Above Surcharge Type: recap; tags: ['stress-test', 'dfast', 'capital']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Results, no distribution limits. - Title: Operational Risk Update: Cyber and Fraud Prevention Protocols Type: policy; tags: ['operational-risk', 'cyber', 'conduct']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: false Body outline: Zero-trust, reporting hotline. **Ch4 Technology & Innovation** (2 articles; 0 highlights, 1 sticky): - Title: LLM Suite Rollout: AI Access for All 316K Employees Type: announcement; tags: ['llm', 'ai', 'tech']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Summarization, code assist; Dimon quotes. - Title: Onyx Blockchain: First Public Repo Settlement Live Type: milestone; tags: ['onyx', 'blockchain', 'jpm-coin']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false Body outline: Digital assets, institutional settlement. **Ch5 People & Careers** (2 articles; 0 highlights, 1 sticky): - Title: 327 New Managing Directors: Class of 2024 Across 42 Countries Type: spotlight; tags: ['md-promotions', 'careers', 'talent']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true Body outline: Committee review, global impact. - Title: Return-to-Office Policy: Five Days for All Roles Type: policy; tags: ['rto', 'office-policy', 'culture']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: true Body outline: Dimon directive, regional guidance. ### 4. HUB-LEVEL POLISH - **company_name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. - **website_name**: JPMorganChase.com - **default_language**: en-US - **supported_languages**: ["en-US"] - **login_quick_links**: [{text: "Careers", url: "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {text: "Investor Relations", url: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {text: "Newsroom", url: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}, {text: "Annual Report", url: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report"}, {text: "Business Principles", url: "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles"}] - **sidebar_navigation**: ["collaborators", "documents", "approvalRequests", "learning", "ideation"] (reflects client coverage, regulatory docs, risk approvals, apprenticeships, innovation) This is a complete design. Shall I build it end-to-end, or would you like to adjust anything first — channel names, article plan, colors, or hub settings?

**Entity**: New Scope  
**Name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet  
**ID**: (server-generated)  

**Scope Fields**:
- name: "JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet"
- description: "Central hub for firm-wide updates, business line performance, risk management, compliance policies, and strategic communications upholding the Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy."
- welcome_message: "Welcome to the JPMorgan Chase & Co. intranet, your source for timely insights on record FY2024 results ($166B revenue, $58B net income), global operations across 100+ countries, and key initiatives like the 270 Park Avenue HQ and LLM Suite rollout."
- channel_creation_by_admins_only: true
- number_of_highlights: 4
- highlights_carousel: true
- highlights_style: "BannerCarousel"
- primary_color: "#003B7A"
- primary_color_contrast: "#FFFFFF"
- secondary_color: "#117ACA"
- warn_color: "#C8102E"
- warn_color_contrast: "#FFFFFF"

- footer_block_links: 3 groups (Company/About/Careers/IR; Global Presence/NY/London/APAC; Resources/Annual/News/Business Principles)
- navigation_links: topBarLinks (3), footerLinks (5), socialLinks (LinkedIn/Twitter/YouTube)

**Channels** (5 total; Ch1-3 primary/sticky):
- Ch1 Leadership & Strategy (corporate, #003B7A, jp/leadership_speech.png, tabs:Articles, FAQ:[] ) — all fields as designed
- Ch2 Business Line Performance (public, #117ACA, jp/financial_report.png, tabs:Articles, FAQ:[] )
- Ch3 Risk & Compliance (corporate, #C8102E, jp/risk.png, tabs:Articles/Pages, FAQ:3 items )
- Ch4 Technology & Innovation (public, #117ACA, jp/blockchain.png, tabs:Articles/Pages, FAQ:2 items, hide_feed/highlights:true )
- Ch5 People & Careers (public, #003B7A, jp/community.png, tabs:Articles, FAQ:3 items, hide_feed/highlights:true )

**Planned follow-ups**: Then seed articles (3/3/3/2/2 per channel with full HTML bodies, highlights/sticky/flags), verify_scope, update_global_settings.

Shall I proceed, or would you like to change anything?
